$description: Brutalist demo — ADR-022 shape/density overlay exemplar (#128, epic #124). Proves a tenant can be "sharp + dense" — role.radius pinned to 0 (density-invariant) and semantic.space.component.padding tightened at rest, tightened further under [data-density="compact"] via the Compact figma-variables mode (R9). Storybook/Chromatic exemplar only — no deployment, no legal entity.

radius.$description: Brutalist demo: zero corner radius system-wide — sharp edges are the brand identity, density-invariant (no Compact mode).

padding.$description: Brutalist demo: tightened component padding baseline (16px, was 24px). Tightens further to 8px under [data-density="compact"] via the Compact mode below (ADR-022 R9).
